title: Clinical Instructor
description:
Are you passionate about nursing education and shaping the next generation of healthcare professionals? We are seeking a Clinical Instructor to lead and coordinate clinical training, ensuring excellence in patient care and staff development.

What You’ll Do:

  • Lead unit-based clinical education and precept student nurses from learning institutions

  • Develop and implement training programs, including orientation, on-the-job training, and continuing education

  • Assess, plan, implement, and evaluate preceptorship schemes for new staff

  • Serve as a resource and mentor to Nurse Managers on clinical practices and nursing education

  • Ensure nursing standards are followed and patient care delivery meets established guidelines

  • Conduct summative assessments of nursing staff and students

  • Develop and deliver training for non-nursing staff and volunteers where applicable

What We’re Looking For:

  • Diploma or Degree in Nursing; Specialist Diploma in Clinical Education / CI Cert

  • Registered Nurse with the Singapore Nursing Board

  • Minimum 6 years of clinical care experience

  • Strong communication, mentoring, and organizational skills

Why This Role is Exciting:

  • Play a pivotal role in advancing nursing competence and patient care quality

  • Shape and inspire both new and experienced nurses

  • Opportunity to grow your career in a dynamic healthcare learning environment

    Kindly email your resume in a detailed Word format to: enoch.cheong@peopleprofilers.com

    Only shortlisted applicants will be contacted.

    People Profilers Pte Ltd

    Address: 20 Cecil Street, #08-09, Plus Building, Singapore 049705

    Contact: +65 6950 9740

    EA License No.: 02C4944

    EA Personnel Reg. No.: R21100787

    EA Personnel: Enoch Cheong
